description: Remove confusing dummy data from Dashboard and create a script to seed the agents table.

userStories.title: Create database seed script
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a SQL script to populate the agents table so it is not empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a file named `seed_agents.sql` in the root directory
The script should INSERT the 3 core agents ('agent_general', 'agent_docs', 'agent_vision') into the agents table

userStories.title: Remove dummy data from Dashboard
userStories.description: As a user, I want the dashboard to show my actual data instead of hardcoded dummy arrays.
acceptanceCriteria: In `frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx`, remove the hardcoded `timelineData`, `distributionData`, and `recentRuns` arrays
Update the Recharts and Table components to handle an empty state (0 runs) gracefully instead of crashing
Ensure the Task Distribution pie chart uses actual data from `liveRuns` if available, or renders an empty/placeholder state
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
